//: Cline / Kilo Code VS Code Extension Config
//applies_to: Works for both Cline and Kilo Code extensions — same settings
//setup: 1. Install Cline or Kilo Code extension in VS Code
2. Open extension settings (gear icon in sidebar)
3. Set API Provider to: OpenAI Compatible
5. Set API Key to: local (any value works)
7. Make sure the bridge is running (start.bat)

//models.executive-swarm: Full board meeting — routes to all 5 executives
//models.cto: CTO only — code and architecture (fastest for coding tasks)
//models.cfo: CFO only — cost and risk analysis
//models.coo: COO only — task planning and execution

//tip: For coding tasks, select 'cto' model directly — faster than full board
